scripts.test:all: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.browser.ts
scripts.test:Cloud: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts unit.test.ts integration-cloud.test.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.browser.ts unit.test.ts integration-cloud.test.ts
scripts.test:SelfHosted: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts unit.test.ts integration-selfhosted.test.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.browser.ts unit.test.ts integration-selfhosted.test.ts
scripts.example: cd example && npm i && npm start
